notes.title: UK/RHD scope
notes.text: Only UK-market right-hand-drive vehicles are in scope. Component locations remain unverified until supported by UK RHD workshop evidence.

notes.title: Platform split
notes.text: Audi primary evidence verifies MQB A0 for the A1 generation produced from October 2018. The 8X PQ25 claim remains research in progress.

notes.title: Key-system split
notes.text: Keyed and advanced-key/keyless variants must remain separate. Current public sources do not establish their complete UK production ranges or locksmith procedures.

notes.title: Repository reuse search
notes.text: The repository-wide verified-architecture audit found no record-level claim with two traceable sources eligible for automatic reuse.

notes.title: Tool evidence limit
notes.text: The Xhorse VVDI2 VAG manual names Audi A1 in a service-mode category. This is tool-menu evidence only and does not prove universal add-key or all-keys-lost support.
